scripts.full: concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev && npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend
scripts.start: npm run prisma:deploy --prefix backend && npm start --prefix backend
